Auspicious is a sword which smells like the Karavlra flower,
blue lily, elephant's ichor, ghee, saffron, round jasmine or Campaka
flower, whereas harmful is one that smells like cow's urine, silt or
fat. Similarly, one with the smell of tortoise, marrow, blood or
salt causes danger and misery; and one with the lustre of beryl, gold
and lightning confers victory, health and progress.
